title: cyclosorus microsorus
intro: Cyclosorus microsorus, also known as the microsorus fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus microsorus include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cyclosorus microsorus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to enhance its medicinal properties.
